Name: TSMC
Rationale: Current $338. AI foundry backbone — NVDA/AMD/Apple all depend on TSMC. Entry on ~12% pullback to $295 gives meaningful margin of safety. Thesis: AI capex = TSMC wafer demand.

Name: Applied Materials
Rationale: Current $341. Semcon equipment leader, every new fab buys AMAT tools. Correlated with WFE (wafer fab equipment) cycle. Entry on pullback to $295.

Name: Palantir
Rationale: Current $151 — has run 8x from 2024 lows, valuation stretched at ~60x revenue. Thesis intact (AIP enterprise adoption) but risk/reward less compelling at current price. Wait for $120 pullback.

Name: Micron
Rationale: Current $426. HBM3E inside every AI GPU, SK Hynix dominant but MU closing gap. Cyclical — any memory oversupply narrative will create entry. Target $370 on weakness.

Name: Super Micro Computer
Rationale: Current $31 — near target already. Speculative recovery from accounting scandal. Small position only. Binary: clean FY2025 audit = re-rate, new issue = pain.
